fullArticle:
BEIJING, July 10 (Xinhua) -- China and Namibia on Friday released a joint statement on building a China-Namibia community with a shared future for the new era.

Please see the attachment for the full text of the joint statement. ■

Full text: Joint Statement Between the People's Republic of China and the Republic of Namibia on Building a China-Namibia Community with a Shared Future for the New Era...
